violations.description: Person in charge. — --Certified food service manager had an expired certificate or is no longer associated with this establishment. -Posted CFSM expired April 2026.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Pink residue at back surface edges of ice chutes at soda machine.

Plumbing system. — --Plumbing system was not designed, constructed, operated and/or maintained according to regulation. -Hot water not available at hand sink at time of inspection (stated as affected by car wash use/hot water heater issue.)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Design, installation, clean, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
